notes: Curated 'current best' registry for Fal.ai. Update default and add entries when better models drop. Verify fal_id values at fal.ai/models if a 404 occurs. unit_price_per_second_usd is for video models; if missing or stale (>30 days), WebFetch fal.ai/models/{fal_id} before quoting cost.

nano-banana-pro.best_for: Photorealistic and stylized image gen. Strong prompt adherence with natural-language descriptive prompts. Current Apr 2026 default. TEXT-TO-IMAGE ONLY, silently ignores image_urls. Use nano-banana-pro-edit for image-to-image.

nano-banana-pro-edit.best_for: Image-to-image editing variant of Nano Banana Pro. Honors image_urls as actual reference photos for identity/composition preservation. Use this when passing --input-image.

gpt-image-2.best_for: Alternative when Nano Banana misinterprets complex multi-subject scenes. Stylized output.

seedance-2-pro.best_for: ByteDance's flagship image-to-video Apr 2026. Cinematic motion, synchronized audio, start/end frame control. Strong general-purpose default.

seedance-2-fast.best_for: Faster, cheaper Seedance. Use for iteration drafts.

kling-v3-pro.best_for: Top-tier Kling. Cinematic visuals, fluid motion, native audio. Strong alternative when Seedance feels stiff. Cheap iteration option vs kling-v3-4k.

kling-v3-4k.best_for: Native 4K Kling. Use only when 4K final delivery is required. Slower and more expensive.

topaz-video.best_for: Topaz Video AI upscaler. Cleans + sharpens + upscales real footage. Use for making low-res clips HD. Proteus model is the safe general default. Scales by a single upscale_factor so aspect ratio is always preserved.

pricing_tiers_per_second_usd.note: Price DOUBLES if output is 60fps. To stay on the cheaper tier, downconvert the source to 30fps before upscaling (the script's --fps flag does this).

topaz-image.best_for: Topaz image upscaler. Sharpens + upscales photos. Standard V2 model is the safe default. Scales by a single upscale_factor so aspect ratio is always preserved. Cheap (per-image, not per-second).
